Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: hair ornaments [300209287], hair adornments [300426850], hair accessories [300225910], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Implements having two or more teeth and an ornamental portion intended to be seen when the teeth are inserted in the hair. For similar implements that are intended primarily for grooming rather than display, use "combs (grooming tools)."

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Peine que tiene tres o más dientes y una porción ornamental superior, concebida para ser vista cuando los dientes se insertan en el pelo.
Kammen met drie of meer tanden en een decoratief bovendeel dat zichtbaar dient te blijven als de tanden in het haar zijn geschoven.
具有兩個以上梳齒以及一個裝飾部分的器具，當梳齒沒入髮中時，可看見該裝飾部份。若是指主要供梳妝打扮而非展示用的類似器具，則稱為「梳子（梳妝打扮工具）」。

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)
